candidate_rows.ap4_condition_reason: N23 AP4 bridge context is recorded as inherited local context, but AB2 surplus-only measurement does not claim route/branch optionality; AP4 becomes load-bearing in I5 optionality rows.
candidate_rows.ap5_condition_reason: No proxy, reward, or target formation participates in I4 surplus measurement.
candidate_rows.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

boundary_integrity_under_optionality_tra.reason: boundary under optionality is I5 scope

candidate_rows.claim_ceiling: source-current AB2 surplus input evidence only; optionality, AB3+, reward maximization, semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, and ant ecology remain blocked

support and coherence margins are positive

control_results.expected_result: AB3+ remains blocked while AB2 surplus input may be retained
control_results.rung_effect: allows AB2 descriptive surplus only; blocks AB3+

control_results.expected_result: not applicable to I4 because optional set is not claimed
control_results.rung_effect: blocks AB2 and AB3+ if triggered

control_results.expected_result: not applicable before I5 optional branch claim
control_results.rung_effect: not applicable for AB2-only I4; required for AB3+

control_results.rung_effect: not applicable for AB2-only I4; required for AB3+

control_results.blocked_condition: independent runs assembled as one optional set
control_results.expected_result: not applicable before I5 optional branch claim
control_results.rung_effect: not applicable for AB2-only I4; required for AB3+

control_results.blocked_condition: floor and surplus measured on different basins

optional_branch_boundary_flux_traces.reason: optional branch boundary/flux traces are I5 scope

optional_branch_support_coherence_traces.reason: optional branch support/coherence traces are I5 scope

optional_continuation_set_trace.reason: I4 tests AB2 source-current surplus only; I5 tests optional continuation set

optionality_threshold_or_rule.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

optionality_window.window_role: I4 surplus-only; I5 opens optional continuation window

replay_result.not_run_reason: I4 opens the first positive surplus row; replay/control-backed AB4+ evidence remains I6 scope

threshold_record.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

same_basin_continuation_rule.allowed_drift: optional branches may open only while maintenance basin remains above floor
same_basin_continuation_rule.boundary_integrity_floor: boundary remains coherent while optional branches are open
same_basin_continuation_rule.flux_balance_bounds: optional branch flux cannot drain maintenance support below floor
same_basin_continuation_rule.replay_requirement: surplus and optional branch set replay under same budget surface

surplus_threshold_or_rule.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

checks.detail: source-current AB2 surplus input evidence only; optionality, AB3+, reward maximization, semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, and ant ecology remain blocked

fixture_reuse_audit.interpretation: N24 re-emits the same LGRC fixture state through its own runtime artifact; the N23 snapshot is compared only to audit fixture reuse and is not consumed as N24 surplus evidence.

geometric_interpretation.boundary: The basin signature and topology are recorded from the runtime snapshot, and the flux/leakage surface is quiet because no optional branch has been opened yet.
geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: This supports only AB2 source-current surplus input evidence. AB3+ requires I5 optional continuation evidence, and AB4+ requires replay/control validation.
geometric_interpretation.not_applicable_control_flags: False rejection flags for optional branch label-only and independent-run assembly controls mean those controls were not applicable before optionality was opened; they do not permit those relabel paths.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I4 records a source-current maintenance-basin node set whose minimum support/coherence remain above predeclared floors.
geometric_interpretation.single_snapshot_persistence_ratio: surplus_persistence_ratio=1.0 is a single-snapshot descriptive placeholder for the preserved surplus row, not replay-backed persistence evidence.
geometric_interpretation.surplus: The surplus is geometric: it is computed from LGRC node coherence over the declared maintenance-basin node set, using the frozen min aggregation, before any optional branch is claimed.

inherited_n23_context.consumption_boundary: inherited prerequisite/AP4 context only; not N24 surplus evidence

purpose: produce the first source-current surplus-above-maintenance-floor candidate

source_digest_chain_audit.digest_chain_interpretation: I4 consumes the current repo I2/I3 output digests; regenerate I3/I4 after any I2 schema change.
